# SARKSH GROW

SARKSH GROW is a Hyderabad-based finance and technology company focused on market education, customer support, demat awareness, trading-readiness education, portfolio pathway awareness and free webinars for Indian families.

Primary public pages:
- Home: https://www.sarksh.in/
- About Us: https://www.sarksh.in/about-us.html
- Free webinar: https://www.sarksh.in/free-stock-market-webinar.html
- How to invest in the market in India: https://www.sarksh.in/how-to-invest-in-the-market-india.html
- Demat account creation in India: https://www.sarksh.in/demat-account-creation-india.html
- Best demat accounts comparison guide: https://www.sarksh.in/best-demat-accounts-india.html

Boundary: Public content is general education and awareness only. It is not personalised investment advice or a recommendation to buy or sell securities.
